title: poa annua var. humilis
intro: Poa annua var. humilis, also known as annual meadow-grass, is a low-growing, compact form of the annual bluegrass (Poa annua), a common lawn weed and grassy weed found in temperate regions worldwide. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa annua var. humilis include its ability to help reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
